description: Product Description NIVEA Pearl & Beauty Anti-Perspirant Roll On (50ml) ‚Äì Care and protection for beautiful underarms Experience reliable protection and underarm care with NIVEA Pearl & Beauty Anti-Perspirant, a gentle yet effective formula designed to beautify and protect. Enriched with natural pearl extracts, it helps even out skin tone, while Avocado Oil leaves your underarms feeling soft, smooth, and nourished. This anti-perspirant offers Derma 72h Active Protection, providing long-lasting defence against sweat and odour while remaining kind to your skin. With its delicate floral fragrance, it keeps you feeling fresh and confident all day. Dermatologically approved and free from ethyl alcohol, it‚Äôs perfect for all skin types, delivering care and protection in one. How to use: Apply this alcohol-free deodorant roll on on underarms, do not apply to broken or irritated skin, allow it to dry completely. Product Benefits: Provides 72-hour reliable anti-perspirant protection Beautifies underarms with natural pearl extracts Enriched with Avocado Oil for soft, smooth skin Features a lasting floral fragrance Dermatologically tested and alcohol-free 50ml Ingredients Butane Isobutane Propane Cyclomethicone Aluminum Chlorohydrate Isopropyl Palmitate Parfum Hydrolyzed Pearl Talc Persea Gratissima Oil Octyldodecanol Disteardimonium Hectorite Dimethicone Propylene Carbonate Dimethiconol Geraniol Benzyl Alcohol Directions 1. Clean and dry the armpits before use. 2. Apply a thin, even layer of deodorant to the armpits. 3. Let the deodorant dry completely before putting on clothes. Safety Warning Pressurised container: Protect from sunlight and do not expose to temperatures exceeding 50¬∞C. Do not pierce or burn even after use. Use exclusively for the intended purpose. Do not spray into eyes. Do not apply to irritated or damaged skin. Do not spray on naked flame or any incandescent material. Keep away from sources of ignition - No smoking.
